title: Rosļikovs resigns as leader of "For Stability!" party
summary_full: Riga city councillor and former head of the "For Stability!" party in the Saeima, Aleksejs Rosļikovs resigned from the position of chairman and member of the political force's board on Monday, according to another leader of the party, Saeima deputy Svetlana Čulkova.
